title: Midjourney V8 is Finally Here! Full Testing (Censorship + Realism)

segments.text: Midjourney version 8 is finally here.
And they're boasting it to be the
biggest leap in Midjourney yet with five
times faster rendering and enhanced
detail and coherence. I've spent hours
testing version 8 to its limits and I'm
going to show you what its strengths
are, what its weaknesses are, and how it
compares to the competition. Midjourney
version 8 is currently available in
alpha and you can come to
alpha.midjourney.com to try it out
